description_long: This is a vintage-style biplane with a striking purple color scheme, featuring two stacked wings supported by black struts. The fuselage is streamlined and painted in a gradient from blue to white at the nose, where a red propeller is mounted. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with visible control elements and a single seat. The tail section includes a horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, both matching the purple color of the wings. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The overall design evokes early 20th-century aircraft, with a compact, lightweight build and classic aviation features.
description: A vintage purple biplane with stacked wings, open cockpit, red propeller, and fixed landing gear, evoking early aviation design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dual stacked wings, red propeller, and open cockpit behind the engine cowling.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the fuselage, wing struts, and the open cockpit's position behind the upper wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail assembly with horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the symmetry of the biplane's wings.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the engine details, landing gear, and the open cockpit's placement relative to the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a standard cruciform layout.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage.
